feat.name: Pheromonal Message
feat.text: Your communicative pheromones are particularly well developed from years of living with other athamarus. You send a brief message to one ally within 60 feet, or 120 feet in water. No other creature can understand the message. The message must be short and simple, and can't convey ideas that would require complex or novel wording if spoken, such a creature's name or proper nouns.

traits.name: Olfactory
traits.text: An olfactory effect can affect only creatures that can smell it. This applies only to olfactory parts of the effect, as determined by the GM.
